name: Sand Dunes Cocoa Expresso Bars
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 teaspoons Powdered instant espresso or powdered coffee
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Lightly spray an 8-inch square baking pan with light vegetable cooking spray.
3. In a medium saucepan over low heat, melt the corn oil.
4. Add sugar and stir until well blended.
5. Remove from heat and stir in cocoa powder and powdered instant espresso or coffee.
6. Add thawed egg substitute and stir to blend.
7. Stir in flour and chopped walnuts.
8. Spread batter into prepared pan.
9. Bake for 25 minutes or until edges begin to pull away from sides of the pan.
10. Cool in the pan on a wire rack.
11. Sprinkle powdered sugar over top.
12. Cut into bars. Makes 16 bars.
Calories: 100 Protein: 2 g Fat: 3 g Sodium: 55 mg Carb: 16 g Cholesterol: 0 mg Calories from fats: 27%
